title: I’ve been using the Asus ROG Strix Scar 18 (2026), and this is the best (and biggest) gaming laptop you can buy right now
summary: The Asus ROG Strix Scar 18 is unmatched in terms of gaming performance, with smart, upgradable design allowing the CPU and GPU to stretch their wings. You’re not hallucinating: the ROG Strix Scar 18 really is that eye-wateringly expensive.
